member.name: T:Key
member.summary:
A common base for the signing authority or key that entities in Hedera may have.
See Hedera Documentation

member.name: M:Key.FromBytes(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Create Key from proto.Key byte array

member.name: M:Key.FromProtobufKey(Proto.Key)
member.summary: Create a specific key type from the protobuf.
member.param: the protobuf key of unknown type

member.name: M:Key.ToProtobufKey
member.summary: Serialize this key as a protobuf object
